title: Kingdom of the Spiders
review: A real made-for-TV looking B movie. In terms of writing the biggest flaw is that Shatner is the only character who really matters, and he is too calm and not at all afraid of the tarantulas. How can a horror movie build tension if the characters aren't scared? A lot of animals were harmed in the making of this, and a lot of women were belittled. That's just the way 1970s television and low budget feature films were.
